style: Cinematic premium stream sign-off with editorial restraint: a dark navy night field, warm off-white typography, vivid lime trace details, and a coral setting-disc focal point. The energy settles rather than dies; elegant asymmetry and subtle broadcast metadata keep the frame alive and loopable.
font: IBM Plex Sans, Space Grotesk, Arial, sans-serif

layout.secondary_focal_point: coral setting-disc and orbit arcs centered near x=1580, y=720
layout.composition: Upper-left typographic mass descends toward a lower-right coral horizon-disc; the diagonal eye path is reinforced by lime trajectory dots. Headline 142-166px, uppercase, weight 700-800; subheadline 40-48px with generous tracking.

elements.look: sparse deterministic lime/off-white pin grid across navy at 14-20% opacity
localized deep-navy radial vignette, no full-screen linear gradient
cropped SESSION COMPLETE ghost type running vertically along right edge at 12% opacity
lime SESSION COMPLETE / 03 with tiny square indicator
warm off-white hero text with ENDED outlined then filling solid
warm off-white sentence with watching underlined lime
long 2px off-white horizon rule crossing behind the setting disc
large coral disc half-submerged under the horizon, with navy occlusion
two incomplete lime elliptical arcs plus five fixed trajectory motes
bottom-left OFF AIR coral chip, center session duration ticks, bottom-right THANK YOU / LOOP 08S

motion_system.dominant_motif: Graceful de-energizing: elements descend, orbit, and settle across a horizon while the thank-you line remains warm and present.
motion_system.blueprint: kinetic-type-beats with a titlecard-reveal restraint modifier
motion_system.build: 0.00-2.80s: deterministic pin lights assemble from shallow depth; horizon rule draws outward from the coral disc; STREAM rises in softly from below while ENDED glyphs tumble from small depth offsets and lock into an outline, then fill warm off-white; disc rises to its half-set position and orbit arcs draw around it.
motion_system.breathe: 2.80-6.45s: headline and gratitude line stay readable; coral disc lowers only 26px as the arcs counter-rotate 8 degrees; five motes drift along short precomputed trajectories; lime underline draws under watching at 4.10s, then OFF AIR indicator gives one soft coral pulse at 5.40s.
motion_system.resolve: 6.45-8.00s: disc and motes retrace upward to their initial below-horizon positions, orbit arcs un-draw to opening values, pin lights return to shallow scatter, and title glyphs separate to their opening offsets on a gentle stagger. The navy field and horizon seed match frame 0 for an invisible loop cut.
motion_system.easing: power2.out for type assembly, circ.out for disc rise, sine.inOut for orbital breathe, power2.inOut for the symmetrical loop reset
motion_system.determinism: Pin and glyph offsets are index-derived constants; every orbit and pulse is a finite tween on the paused master timeline; no clocks, random values, or infinite repeats.

customize.contrast: Primary and secondary text use warm off-white on navy; lime supports emphasis and trajectories; coral is a large scenic mass and OFF AIR state, not small running text.

scenes.motion: Depth-scattered glyphs settle into an editorial title while a horizon, coral disc, and orbital traces assemble diagonally across frame.
A long readable hold with a slow setting-disc descent, counter-rotating arcs, trajectory motes, underline draw, and one restrained status pulse.
The horizon system and type choreography retrace to the opening scatter without a fade-to-black, preserving life across the loop boundary.
